settings.title: Framework Settings
settings.not_configured: Framework is not fully configured. Fill in and save the required sections below.

messages.dkim_generated: DKIM keys generated. Copy the DNS record below.
messages.save_error: Could not save settings. Please check the form.
messages.ftp_pretest_success_cleanup_warning: Remote upload succeeded, but the cleanup step needs manual review.

dkim.description: Generate an RSA 2048-bit key pair for DKIM email authentication. After generation, add the DNS record to your domain.

completion.title: Finalize Configuration
completion.description: When all sections above are correctly saved and the database is reachable, mark the framework as configured. This step is only allowed after an active privileged account already exists.
completion.privileged_account_setup_description: Before finalizing the setup, create the initial active privileged account. This step provisions the account only; it does not mark the framework as configured.
completion.privileged_account_hint: Choose your own credentials. They are stored hashed (bcrypt) and never printed in logs.
completion.privileged_account_create_success: Privileged account created. You can finalize the setup now.
completion.privileged_account_exists_description: An active privileged account already exists. You can finalize the setup now.
completion.privileged_account_exists_success: Privileged account already exists. You can finalize the setup now.
completion.finalize_requires_privileged_account: Create an active privileged account before finalizing the framework configuration.
completion.reset_description: Re-opens the finalization wizard. Existing config values are preserved — only the 'configured' flag is cleared. Use this if you need to re-run setup or create a new privileged account.

errors.app_json_missing: app.json is missing — save the Application section first.
errors.db_json_missing: db.json is missing — save the Database section first.
errors.db_incomplete: Database configuration is incomplete. Fill at least host, database, username.
errors.db_unreachable: Cannot connect to the database with the saved credentials.
errors.users_table_missing: The 'users' table does not exist in the configured database. Run the migration scripts first.
errors.auth_tables_missing: The setup-required authentication tables are missing in the configured database.
errors.privileged_account_create_failed: Could not create the privileged account.
errors.privileged_account_required: Finalize is blocked until an active privileged account exists.
errors.account_email_exists: A user with this email address already exists.

overview.description: Surface compacte pour le bootstrap du framework, les services runtime et la préparation opérationnelle.

foundation.title: Fondation
foundation.description: Identité applicative, base de données et courrier sortant.

runtime.title: Session, cache et realtime
runtime.description: Persistance des requêtes, activation du cache et valeurs WebSocket.

security.title: Sécurité et limites d’accès
security.description: Renforcement de l’authentification, CORS et génération DKIM.

operations.title: Opérations et diagnostic
operations.description: Identifiants de déploiement, journaux et miroirs de développement.

hints.log_max_file_size_mb: Lorsqu’un fichier de journal dépasse cette taille, il est automatiquement pivoté. Garde-fou plateforme : 1-50 Mo.
hints.log_max_rotated_files: Nombre maximal de fichiers historiques conservés par journal. Garde-fou plateforme : 1-10 fichiers.
